failure_classes.description: The role prompt omitted instructions needed to produce valid output.
The run used missing, weak, forbidden, or insufficient sources.
A material claim lacks citation or evidence linkage.
Evidence exists but is not admitted, structured, or strong enough.
Synthesis failed to reconcile evidence, contradictions, or unresolveds.
Task dependencies, expected outputs, or re-entry links are invalid.
Review failed to detect or route a material gap.
The report introduced unsupported facts or lost claim boundaries.
Allowed claims widened beyond score, evidence, or scorer custody.
